title: Keurig Dr Pepper is a strong sell despite the strong performance
text: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ:KDP) announced Q4 and annual results, which indicate strong performance. The company reported 8.7% growth in Q4 net sales and 9.2% annual growth.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) Q4 Earnings In Line, Sales Surpass
text: Keurig Dr Pepper's (KDP) Q4 results gain from solid consumer demand and improvement in the away-from-home channel. Management issues an upbeat 2022 view.

title: No Caffeine Jitters for Keurig Dr. Pepper
text: Keurig Dr. Pepper Inc. ( KDP , Financial) reported strong financial results on Thursday for both the fourth quarter and full year ended Dec. 31, 2021 and affirmed guidance for 2022. Wall Street expects more of the same during the coming months.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper's (KDP) CEO Bob Gamgort on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Keurig Dr Pepper's (KDP) CEO Bob Gamgort on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc (KDP) Q4 Earnings Meet Estimates
text: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc (KDP) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 2.39%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Keurig Dr Pepper net income nearly doubles
text: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. KDP, -1.32% said Thursday its fourth-quarter net income rose to $843 million, or 59 cents a share, from $428 million, or 30 cents a share, in the year-ago quarter. The drink company's adjusted earnings rose to 45 cents a share from 39 cents a share.

title: NASDAQ-100 Has Fallen 16% Below All-Time Highs - Few Stocks Outperform
text: NASD AQ-100 has fallen the most since 2020 Crash. Only 13 stocks in the index are up year-to-date.Four stocks are up more than 5%.

title: Will Supply-Chain Disruptions Mar Keurig's (KDP) Q4 Earnings?
text: Keurig (KDP) Q4 results are likely to reflect gains from market share growth, and in-market performance across categories and brands. Inflationary costs and supply-chain woes are likely to have hurt.

title: 7 Food Stocks to Store Up On Amid Inflation Concerns
text: Economic recovery can be brutal to the stock market. But one way to combat the bruising selloff is to add some food stocks to your portfolio.
